description: If all you need is a toned butt and hamstrings but hate those morning walks in toners, then this Tone Ups Double Step sandal from skechers is perfect for you. Designed with balance pods and adjustable closures, it makes for a great everyday wear, allowing you to live in comfort and tone yourself up in style. Heel height: 1 3/4" Upper Flexible neoprene fabric straps with adjustable closures to offer a customised Fit and lock the foot in place Cushioned and ergonomically textured comfort PU footbed Heel gel comfort pad for added comfort Midsole Supportive comfort midsole made of cushioned rubber for an absolutely great feeling all day Balance pods that alter your gait mildly to tone the butt and hamstring muscles Outsole Flexible rubber traction outsole for absolute grip and traction on various terrain Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
